data.description: AUSTRIAN COURT FINDS CLIMBER GUILTY OF MANSLAUGHTER OVER GIRLFRIEND'S DEATH ON AUSTRIA'S HIGHEST MOUNTAIN AFTER HE LEFT HER TO FETCH HELP -MEDIA

data.title: MFA Financial, Inc. declares dividends on Series B and Series C preferred stocks; 7.50% for Series B and 6.50% for Series C.
data.description: In New York, MFA Financial, Inc. stated today that its Board of Directors approved dividends for both its 7.50% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (NYSE: MFA) and 6.50% Series C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The company's Board of Directors declared a payout for the Series B Preferred Stock, following its terms, and the specifics for the Series C Preferred Stock remain undisclosed. The announcement ensures shareholders of the preferred stocks will receive their entitled dividend payments.

data.title: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) reports Q4 2025 net income of $330.8M (compared to $145.9M in 2024) and revenue of $2.65B (up from $1.87B in 2024).
data.description: In Houston, Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE: FIX) released its quarterly and annual financial results up to December 31, 2025. During the final quarter of 2025, the company recorded a net income of $330.8 million, translating to $9.37 per diluted share. This is a significant increase from the same period in 2024 when net income was $145.9 million, or $4.09 per diluted share. Revenue for Q4 2025 stood at $2.65 billion, showcasing growth from $1.87 billion in 2024. Operating cash flow for this period was reported at...

data.title: Chemours Company reports Q4 and full-year 2025 results, a global chemistry company with leading market positions.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Wilmington, Delaware, The Chemours Company, also known as Chemours, announced exciting news. This global chemistry company, trading on NYSE under the ticker symbol CC, has prominent market roles in Thermal & Specialized Solutions, Titanium Technologies, and Advanced Performance Materials.

data.title: Con Edison's 2025 net income for common stock was $2.023 million ($5.66/share) compared to $1.820 million ($5.26/share) in 2024.
data.description: In New York on February 19, 2026, Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) disclosed their financial results for 2025. The net income for common stock in 2025 was $2,023 million, equating to $5.66 per share. This marks an increase from the previous year's figures of $1,820 million or $5.26 per share in 2024. Additionally, adjusted earnings (non-GAAP) for 2025 were reported at $2,038 million or $5.70 per share.

data.title: Indie Semiconductor's Q4 earnings report beats estimates by 30%, with EPS of -$0.07 vs $-0.1. Revenue declined by $2k.
data.description: Indie Semiconductor (NASDAQ: INDI) announced its Q4 earnings on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 04:30 PM. In a notable performance, the company exceeded estimated earnings by a significant margin, posting an EPS of $-0.07 compared to the expected $-0.1, representing a beat of 30.0%. However, revenue saw a decrease of $2,000 from the previous year's same quarter. This quarter's results continued the trend from the previous quarter where the company also surpassed EPS estimates. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Strawberry Fields REIT (AMX: STRW) exceeds Q4 earnings expectations with EPS $0.34 (est. $0.21) and $9.61M higher revenue than last year.
data.description: On Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 04:00 PM, the AMEX-listed company Strawberry Fields REIT (STRW) released its Q4 earnings report. The company surpassed estimated earnings by an impressive 61.9%, posting an EPS of $0.34 compared to the forecasted $0.21. In terms of revenue, there was a significant increase of $9.61 million from the corresponding quarter in the previous year. For more details on the earnings report, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Spyre Therapeutics Q4 earnings beat estimates by 5.41% with EPS of $-0.7. Revenue unchanged year-over-year.
data.description: Spyre Therapeutics (NASDAQ: SYRE) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, February 19, 2026 at 04:02 PM. In the report, the company exceeded expected earnings by 5.41%, with an EPS of $-0.7 compared to the estimate of $-0.74. Their revenue remained steady compared to the previous year. Spyre Therapeutics has a history of surpassing EPS expectations by $0.57. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Valaris (NYSE: VAL) exceeds estimated earnings by 2402.44% per shares in Q4. Revenue down $47.00 million from last year.
data.description: Valaris (NYSE: VAL) released its Q4 earnings on February 19, 2026, at 04:30 PM. Their earnings surpassed expectations by 2402.44%, with an EPS of $10.26 compared to the estimated $0.41. However, their revenue decreased by $47.00 million from the previous year. In the previous quarter, Valaris also outperformed expectations. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BioAge Labs (NASDAQ: BIOA) to present at Oppenheimer healthcare conference on Feb. 25-26, 2026.
data.description: BioAge Labs, Inc., a biotechnology company based in Emeryville, California, has disclosed its plan to participate in the Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference scheduled for February 25-26, 2026. The company, listed as BIOA on NASDAQ, specializes in developing therapeutic products for metabolic diseases by focusing on human aging biology. This conference serves as a platform for BioAge to showcase its clinical-stage product candidates to the wider healthcare and life sciences community.

data.title: Host Hotels & Resorts updates investors on Q4 2025 with an online presentation on their website. Largest lodging REIT in the US.
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, on February 19, 2026, Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the largest lodging real estate investment trust in the U.S., released an investor presentation regarding their fourth quarter 2025 performance. This update is available for viewing on the Investor Relations page of the company's website at https://www.hosthotels.com/#key-investors-materials.

data.title: Fertility & Surgical Associates of California opens new facility at 225 W. Hillcrest Drive, Suite 201 in Thousand Oaks.
data.description: A new facility by Fertility & Surgical Associates of California has recently opened in Thousand Oaks, California, located at 225 W. Hillcrest Drive, Suite 201.

data.title: Cherie Myatt appointed Interim President of Vaniam Group, reinforces long-term commitment to value creation. Chicago, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: Cherie Myatt has been named as the Interim President at Vaniam Group, taking on the responsibility of providing executive leadership throughout the organization. This move emphasizes the company's dedication to creating long-term value. The announcement was made on February 19, 2026, in Chicago.

data.title: NNN REIT, Inc. (NYSE: NNN) announces retirement of Board Chair Steven D. Cosler, replaced by Edward J. Fritsch.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on February 19, 2026, NNN REIT, Inc. (NYSE: NNN) shared that Steven D. Cosler, Chairperson, has retired from the Board of Directors as of February 18, 2026. Edward J. Fritsch, an independent director, will assume the role of Chair moving forward.

data.title: Chilean Metals Inc. begins trading on TSX Venture Exchange with symbol "CMCG" on Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: Toronto, on February 19, 2026, Chilean Metals Inc. has officially started trading on the TSX Venture Exchange with the symbol "CMCG." The company submitted a comprehensive application for listing on February 9.

data.title: Select Medical Holdings Corp. reports Q4 and 2025 year-end results, 2026 outlook, and cash dividend declaration.
data.description: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania, on February 19, 2026, Select Medical Holdings Corporation shared its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, listed on the NYSE as SEM, also disclosed its business outlook for 2026 and revealed a cash dividend declaration.

data.title: MDU Resources maintains quarterly dividend at 14 cents per share on common stock; aiming for long-term growth.
data.description: In Bismarck, North Dakota, on February 19, 2026, the board of directors of MDU Resources Group, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of 14 cents per share for their common stock (NYSE: MDU). This amount remains the same as the previous quarter. The board's focus remains on maintaining a consistent long-term dividend for its shareholders.

data.title: Bitcoin Lightning Network hits $1B monthly volume, per River's analysis. Surge anticipated as AI payments gain traction.
data.description: A recent analysis conducted by River, a Bitcoin services company, predicts a substantial increase in transactions. This surge is expected to be driven by individuals and businesses who are exploring the use of AI agentic payments. The analysis suggests that a significant number of transactions are likely to take place as this technology is further embraced by users.
